## Meeting Purpose

[1:1 between Pedro Steimbruch and Daniel Lopes to discuss project progress, company strategy, and professional growth.](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pedro is working on optimizing database performance for the IGP project, handling \~5M records/table](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [GrowthX faces competitive pressure from AI Visibility companies and WearOps in the content creation space](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Content Inventory and Check That projects are critical for scaling services and defending market position](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Pedro is motivated and seeking opportunities to grow professionally within the company](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Topics

### Project Updates

  - [Pedro's working on 2nd IGP project; relationship is fluid and collaborative](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Optimizing database (Postgres) for faster dashboard loading (5M+ records/table)](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Exploring TimescaleDB plugin and potentially DuckDB for performance gains](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Goal: Load 3 months of data in 4-5 seconds, full year in 10 seconds or less](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Company Strategy and Challenges

  - [Two "existential threats" identified:](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
    1.  AI Visibility companies (e.g., Profound, AIOps) moving into content creation
    2.  WearOps following a similar roadmap to GrowthX
  - [Content Inventory project crucial for scaling service team and meeting client demand](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Check That project needed to compete with AI Visibility companies](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Balancing rapid development with maintaining product cycles and organization](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)

### Professional Growth and Feedback

  - [Pedro expressed desire to grow professionally and become more relevant within GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Daniel noted importance of proactivity, dealing with uncertainty, and ownership in Product Engineering](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Company considering clearer role definitions and levels in the future](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Pedro's performance viewed positively; no immediate critical feedback](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Future Projects and Ideas

  - [Potential involvement in Content Inventory or Check That projects](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Pedro's ideas for Assistant feature to edit documents (company artifacts and assignment outputs)](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Suggestion to survey top Cloud Project users for feature ideas](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pedro to optimize Postgres performance by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Test TimescaleDB and DuckDB alternatives Tuesday-Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Daniel to take a week off for management tasks and focus on Content Inventory](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Pedro to write a Notion doc with rough notes on Assistant feature ideas](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Consider sending a questionnaire to top Cloud Project users for feature suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Daniel to share the pitch for GP's upcoming project with Pedro next week](https://fathom.video/share/sHoxb86wcohuibbHs-yy-3Tc-cixi96U?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
